why_them: No own website found — exists only on Booking.com, Expedia, Hotels.com, TripAdvisor and Yelp. Established family guesthouse in central Dumfries losing 15-20% OTA commission on every booking. Owner-operated for many years, strong review base. Breakfasts served in adjacent Caledonian Hotel suggesting solid revenue. Prime candidate for a direct-booking site with FreeToBook integration.
recommended_service: New website with direct booking integration, Google Business Profile optimisation, basic local SEO

why_them: Website has an expired SSL certificate (rivendellbnb.co.uk), meaning browsers show a security warning to every visitor. No confirmed online booking. 19th-century property with luxury positioning — the broken SSL directly contradicts its premium branding. Easy win: SSL fix plus modernisation package.
recommended_service: Website refresh with SSL renewal, direct booking integration, SEO

why_them: WordPress/Divi site last updated August 2022 — over 3.5 years stale. No online booking at all; guests must phone or email. Farm B&B setting with strong rural tourism appeal. Static, dated content will be losing out to better-presented competitors. Direct-booking widget and fresh content would drive conversion.
recommended_service: Website redesign with booking integration (FreeToBook or Little Hotelier), content refresh, photography guidance

why_them: WordPress/Divi site with no online booking — only a contact form. No confirmed last-update date but design feels static. Thornhill location sits on key A76 touring route through Dumfries & Galloway. Guests must enquire and wait; no instant availability check drives abandonment. A booking widget alone would be a high-ROI upgrade.
recommended_service: Booking integration retrofit, SEO improvement, content update

why_them: GoDaddy Website Builder site with copyright 2023 — a template platform with very limited SEO capability and zero booking functionality. No online booking at all. Located near Cairnryan ferry terminal making it prime for overnight stays from Ireland/N. Ireland ferry travellers, a high-value repeat market. Poor digital presence squanders a strategic location advantage.
recommended_service: New professional website replacing GoDaddy builder, booking integration, location-targeted SEO (Cairnryan ferry traffic)

why_them: WordPress/Oxygen site with no online booking — only a 'Get In Touch' button. Last content update November 2023. 4-star rated property with excellent reviews (9.8 Booking.com) but relying entirely on OTAs for bookings. The ferry-terminal location means high demand exists; a direct booking channel would retain significant commission.
recommended_service: Direct booking integration, website content refresh, Google Ads targeting ferry passengers

why_them: Wix-built site with no online booking visible. Wix limits SEO capabilities significantly vs. a purpose-built WordPress or Squarespace site. Castle Douglas is a busy D&G market town with high summer footfall. No booking system means all reservation traffic goes through Booking.com. Migration from Wix to a proper CMS with booking integration would significantly improve discoverability.
recommended_service: Migration from Wix to WordPress with booking integration and local SEO

why_them: Wix Thunderbolt site with no booking system. Wix's revision count is high (780) suggesting it's been tinkered with by the owner but still lacks booking functionality. Dalbeattie is a gateway for the Sustrans 7 cycling route and Dalbeattie Forest MTB trails — strong demand drivers that the site is not capitalising on with any SEO content.
recommended_service: Migration from Wix, booking integration, cycling/outdoor tourism SEO content

why_them: WordPress/Divi site that sends its self-catering annexe to Sykes Cottages rather than booking direct — paying agency commission unnecessarily. Main B&B has no direct booking. Wigtown is Scotland's National Book Town with annual festival bringing high-quality visitors. SEO targeting book festival and literary tourists would be highly cost-effective for this property.
recommended_service: Direct booking integration removing Sykes dependency, Wigtown Book Festival SEO targeting, Google Business optimisation

location: Newton Stewart, Dumfries and Galloway, DG8 6AT
why_them: Custom/Duda site last published March 2023 — over 3 years without update. Contact-form-only booking process with disclaimer that 'your holiday is not booked until you receive a confirmation from us'. Three cottages sleeping 2-7 near Galloway Forest Park. Listing on Cottages.com means they are paying platform commission on every booking they could capture direct. Site has zero dark sky or cycling trail SEO content despite being ideally placed.
recommended_service: Website rebuild with online booking calendar, Galloway Forest/dark sky SEO, removal of Cottages.com dependency

location: Kirroughtree Lodge, Minnigaff, Newton Stewart, DG8 6NT
why_them: Old Bootstrap-based site with no online booking — static HTML/CSS using a framework that was popular in 2013-2016. Booking/Availability page exists but functionality is absent. Also maintains a Facebook page as secondary channel. Newton Stewart/Galloway Forest location is perfect for dark sky tourism yet the site has no dark sky content. Strong immediate opportunity for a modern Squarespace or WordPress site with Lodgify booking integration.
recommended_service: Full website rebuild, online booking integration, dark sky / Galloway Forest SEO

why_them: Website domain redirects to a parked/suspended page (ww1.lochhill.net) — effectively no functioning website. Established since 1999, VisitScotland listed, appearing on TripAdvisor and multiple directories. The domain exists but the site is broken or parked. Phone: 01557 820225 still circulates on directories. This is an urgent fix opportunity: a new site with online booking for treks and lessons would immediately capture the search traffic currently going to zero.
recommended_service: New website with activity booking system (FareHarbor or Bookeo), local SEO, Google Business Profile setup

why_them: No own website found — listed only on Yell, TripAdvisor, riding-schools.com and horseridinguk.co.uk. Established riding centre adjacent to Barend Holiday Lodges and Sandyhills Bay. Two phone numbers in circulation (01387 780533 and 07774196765). Coastal Galloway setting draws tourists all summer; without a website no online bookings are captured at all. High need score.
recommended_service: New website with online booking for lessons and hacks, Google Business Profile, local SEO

why_them: Actually has a well-maintained WordPress site with online booking (Book Now button), SSL, and was last updated December 2025. Lower priority — included for completeness. The main gap is social media and SEO rather than core website. Could benefit from a conversion-rate audit and Google Ads management in peak season.
recommended_service: SEO audit, Google Ads management, conversion optimisation

location: Near Loch Ken, Castle Douglas area, Dumfries and Galloway
why_them: WordPress/Divi site — no booking functionality confirmed from site audit. Lochside glamping in the Dark Sky Park is a premium product with strong demand. Site appears informational only with enquiry-based contact. The premium price point (estimated £100-180/night) means even a few additional direct bookings per month justifies web investment easily. Dark sky SEO is highly contested and winnable for a specialist operator.
recommended_service: Booking integration (Lodgify or Smoobu), dark sky SEO content package, conversion-focused landing pages

location: Dumfries and Galloway (Dark Sky Park edge)
why_them: Wix site (Wix Thunderbolt) with no confirmed booking system — classic Wix limitations apply. Estate holiday property on edge of UK's first Dark Sky Park. Wix's poor technical SEO means this premium property is likely invisible in organic search. Migration to WordPress with Lodgify integration would dramatically improve bookability and discoverability.
recommended_service: Migration from Wix, professional booking integration, dark sky SEO, estate-level photography consultation

why_them: Actually has a reasonably good setup — Deco Media site with Little Hotelier booking integration and SSL. Last published April 2022 though the build metadata shows recent updates. Lower priority; existing infrastructure is functional. Could benefit from an SEO audit and content refresh rather than a rebuild.
recommended_service: SEO audit and content refresh, Google Business Profile optimisation

why_them: WordPress/Divi site with no booking system and no contact details on the homepage. Note: property reportedly closed for remainder of 2025 due to family illness but may reopen in 2026 — worth approaching in early 2026 as they consider how to re-launch. 5 Victoria Terrace is a prime central Dumfries address. Timing an approach for a re-launch website could be well-received.
recommended_service: Website refresh with direct booking integration, re-launch SEO, Google Business Profile update

why_them: PHP-based custom site from 2017 with no online booking — enquiry only by phone/email. Multi-cottage operator (several units near Wigtown) generating meaningful revenue but stuck on a 2017 custom-coded website. Monday-Friday 9-5 phone line means weekend bookings go elsewhere. A modern self-catering platform (Lodgify, Hostaway or OwnerRez) with 24/7 online availability would transform their conversion rate.
recommended_service: Full rebuild on modern CMS with multi-property booking engine, Wigtown/Book Town SEO, OTA channel manager integration

why_them: WordPress/Divi site last modified February 2022 — over 4 years without update. No online booking visible. Arbigland Estate is the birthplace of John Paul Jones (founder of the US Navy), a unique heritage hook that is completely unexploited in their SEO. Estate-level property with multiple cottages. The combination of stale site, no booking, and underexploited heritage story makes this a high-value pitch.
recommended_service: Website refresh with booking integration, heritage/history SEO content strategy, John Paul Jones tourism tie-in
